common.search_min_chars: Type at least {count} characters to search.
footer.tagline: The premier collaboration network for Vibe Coding developers.
home.hero_description: Discover developer projects, join active collaborations, form small teams, and move work forward in one place. VibeHub is built for builders who want to ship with other builders.
home.value_discovery_desc: Browse real developer projects, open-source tools, and active build logs that are looking for attention or help.
home.value_delivery_desc: Create a team, review join requests, manage tasks and milestones, and keep delivery moving with less friction.
home.value_community_desc: Share ideas, get feedback, and turn discussion into projects, collaboration intent, and actual work shipped.
home.feed.empty_following: You are not following anyone yet, or people you follow have not posted recently. Follow creators from their profile, or jump into the latest discussions.
home.feed.empty_discussions: No discussions yet. Be the first to start one!
home.flywheel.discuss.title: Discuss & Share
home.flywheel.discuss.desc: Share ideas, publish updates, and collect the signal that helps projects improve.
home.flywheel.showcase.title: Showcase Projects
home.flywheel.showcase.desc: Turn ideas into project pages that other developers can discover, follow, and join.
home.flywheel.coordinate.title: Coordinate Delivery
home.flywheel.coordinate.desc: Approve join requests, align around milestones, and ship as a focused small team.
home.flywheel.tools.title: Developer Tools
home.flywheel.tools.desc: Use API keys, OpenAPI, and MCP tools to integrate discovery and collaboration into your workflow.
home.cta_title: Ready to ship with other builders?
home.cta_desc: Create your profile, publish a project, find collaborators, and move from idea to delivery inside one developer-first workflow.
login.title: Sign in to VibeHub
login.subtitle: The platform for Vibe Coding developers
login.oauth_failed: GitHub login failed. Please try again.
login.state_mismatch: Login session expired. Please start over.
login.config_missing: OAuth is not configured on this server.
login.agreement_prefix: By signing in you agree to our
notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty_desc: Join a team or submit a collaboration intent to get notified.
not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved.
